traits.locale_text:
The user can equip two-handed melee weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws), but deals −15% less damage and can perform only basic attacks with them.
Melee attacks made with a two-handed weapon in this hand force targets to pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|86576af20dee418a9d21e1058a9ed87f} penalty or become staggered for 1 round.
The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand.

The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws), but deals −15% less damage and can perform only basic attacks with them.
Melee attacks made with a two-handed weapon in this hand force targets to pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|86576af20dee418a9d21e1058a9ed87f} penalty or become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
